subtitles.original: Physical Autofister!
subtitles.english: Physical Autofister!

subtitles.original: And with us, we have our lovely contestants!
subtitles.english: And with us, we have our lovely contestants!

subtitles.original: BAE!
subtitles.english: BAE!

subtitles.original: Okay, I'm gonna win!
subtitles.english: Okay, I'm gonna win!

subtitles.original: KOBO!
subtitles.english: KOBO!

subtitles.original: Kobo is comfortable.
subtitles.english: Kobo is comfortable.

subtitles.original: TOWA!
subtitles.english: TOWA!

subtitles.original: Towa-sama!
subtitles.english: Towa-sama!

subtitles.original: Today, as said before, we are here to find out who is the ultimate winner of...
subtitles.english: Today, as said before, we are here to find out who is the ultimate winner of...

subtitles.original: ...Physical Autofister 100!
subtitles.english: ...Physical Autofister 100!

subtitles.original: As explained before...
subtitles.english: As explained before...

subtitles.original: ...commercial break, each contestant will have to compete in our physical obstacle course of FUN!
subtitles.english: ...commercial break, each contestant will have to compete in our physical obstacle course of FUN!

subtitles.original: FUN!
subtitles.english: FUN!

subtitles.original: If you're just now tuning in, here is a quick recap!
subtitles.english: If you're just now tuning in, here is a quick recap!

subtitles.original: Everyone starts in a line, you have to run to the other side while avoiding all obstacles, and do a quick little physical activity!
subtitles.english: Everyone starts in a line, you have to run to the other side while avoiding all obstacles, and do a quick little physical activity!

subtitles.original: Grab a question from a dragon, who telepathically gives it to you in your brain, run back and answer a question! Yeah!
subtitles.english: Grab a question from a dragon, who telepathically gives it to you in your brain, run back and answer a question! Yeah!

subtitles.original: We'll do four rounds, and the person with the most points at the end of four rounds is the winner!
subtitles.english: We'll do four rounds, and the person with the most points at the end of four rounds is the winner!

subtitles.original: Okay, well everyone get into position!
subtitles.english: Okay, well everyone get into position!

subtitles.original: What is this?
subtitles.english: What is this?

subtitles.original: So, so, as said before, of course...
subtitles.english: So, so, as said before, of course...

subtitles.original: ...since a lot of these questions will be in English, Bae has a handicap.
subtitles.english: ...since a lot of these questions will be in English, Bae has a handicap.

subtitles.original: She has a handicap, very difficult question.
subtitles.english: She has a handicap, very difficult question.

subtitles.original: What is this?!
subtitles.english: What is this?!

subtitles.original: Nice! Nice, nice!
subtitles.english: Nice! Nice, nice!

subtitles.original: Okay, okay, okay, everyone in position?
subtitles.english: Okay, okay, okay, everyone in position?

subtitles.original: Yes, we have the first round. The first round is, you run over there...
subtitles.english: Yes, we have the first round. The first round is, you run over there...

subtitles.original: ...and you do five jumping jacks! Five jacks.
subtitles.english: ...and you do five jumping jacks! Five jacks.

subtitles.original: Okay, jumping?
subtitles.english: Okay, jumping?

subtitles.original: 走って、5ジャンプやって、質問取って、走って帰る。
subtitles.english: Run, do 5 jacks, grab the question, and run back.

subtitles.original: オッケー、オッケー。いいですか？オッケー。
subtitles.english: Okay, okay. Ready? Okay.

subtitles.original: Three, two, one, GO!
subtitles.english: Three, two, one, GO!

subtitles.original: I was betrayed!
subtitles.english: I was betrayed!

subtitles.original: Please read the question out loud.
subtitles.english: Please read the question out loud.

subtitles.original: Okay. えっと、うんと、I like...
subtitles.english: Okay. Um, well, I like...

subtitles.original: ...うんと、strawberry!
subtitles.english: ...um, strawberry!

subtitles.original: Strawberry! Yes! Name a fruit! Strawberry!
subtitles.english: Strawberry! Yes! Name a fruit! Strawberry!

subtitles.original: One point!
subtitles.english: One point!

subtitles.original: You can give your questions over here.
subtitles.english: You can give your questions over here.

subtitles.original: Well, next round!
subtitles.english: Well, next round!

subtitles.original: Next round! Is everyone ready?
subtitles.english: Next round! Is everyone ready?

subtitles.original: No, no, the crab walk like this!
subtitles.english: No, no, the crab walk like this!

subtitles.original: Crab walk like this! Crab walk!
subtitles.english: Crab walk like this! Crab walk!

subtitles.original: Crab walk and five squats!
subtitles.english: Crab walk and five squats!

subtitles.original: 5スクワット？クラブウォークand 5スクワット？
subtitles.english: 5 squats? Crab walk and 5 squats?

subtitles.original: Wait, do they have to jump?
subtitles.english: Wait, do they have to jump?

subtitles.original: No, we can walk.
subtitles.english: No, we can walk.

subtitles.original: Jump? They have to jump? Okay, okay!
subtitles.english: Jump? They have to jump? Okay, okay!

subtitles.original: 帰る時もこれ？
subtitles.english: When returning, this too?

subtitles.original: 帰る時もな。
subtitles.english: Returning too, right?

subtitles.original: Okay, everyone ready? Three, two, one, GO!
subtitles.english: Okay, everyone ready? Three, two, one, GO!

subtitles.original: これスクワットかね？これ？
subtitles.english: Are these squats? This?

subtitles.original: Okay, come on. Oh, I ripped the mind telepathy...
subtitles.english: Okay, come on. Oh, I ripped the mind telepathy...

subtitles.original: Hey, you can't rip our telepathy paper!
subtitles.english: Hey, you can't rip our telepathy paper!

subtitles.original: Yes! Oh, she's actually really good at math! She's good at math! Wow!
subtitles.english: Yes! Oh, she's actually really good at math! She's good at math! Wow!

subtitles.original: バナナ。またバナナなんだけど！
subtitles.english: Banana. It's banana again!

subtitles.original: 2回連続バナナなんだけど。
subtitles.english: Two times in a row banana.

subtitles.original: Two banana questions!
subtitles.english: Two banana questions!

subtitles.original: おい、日本語書いてるじゃねえか！
subtitles.english: Hey, it's written in Japanese, isn't it!

subtitles.original: What?! I was given a handicap because the questions were in English, they are written in Japanese!
subtitles.english: What?! I was given a handicap because the questions were in English, they are written in Japanese!

subtitles.original: Hey, but the questions are in English...
subtitles.english: Hey, but the questions are in English...

subtitles.original: Okay, okay, we got to keep it rolling, guys! Keep it rolling!
subtitles.english: Okay, okay, we got to keep it rolling, guys! Keep it rolling!

subtitles.original: Do I still have to go around and around?
subtitles.english: Do I still have to go around and around?

subtitles.original: Those are the rules by our producers, who are not us.
subtitles.english: Those are the rules by our producers, who are not us.

subtitles.original: On my telepathy paper, the next one is... sexy walk!
subtitles.english: On my telepathy paper, the next one is... sexy walk!

subtitles.original: Sexy walk! Sexy, sexy!
subtitles.english: Sexy walk! Sexy, sexy!

subtitles.original: Do we get disqualified, do we have to start again if it's not sexy enough?
subtitles.english: Do we get disqualified, do we have to start again if it's not sexy enough?

subtitles.original: Hot, please make up your mind! We'll see, we'll see!
subtitles.english: Hot, please make up your mind! We'll see, we'll see!

subtitles.original: And, three push-ups! Three!
subtitles.english: And, three push-ups! Three!

subtitles.original: 腕立て伏せ3回？オッケー。
subtitles.english: 3 push-ups? Okay.

subtitles.original: And sexy walk! Sexy walk!
subtitles.english: And sexy walk! Sexy walk!

subtitles.original: セクシーウォークね。
subtitles.english: Sexy walk, right.

subtitles.original: セクシーウォーク、セッキシージャンプ。そのセクシーさが足りなかったら万が一やり直しって言われてるから。
subtitles.english: Sexy walk, sexy jump. If the sexiness is not enough, we might have to do it again.

subtitles.original: えええ！？セクシーが足らん！？
subtitles.english: Eee!? Not sexy enough!?

subtitles.original: 任せろ、任せろ！
subtitles.english: Leave it to me, leave it to me!

responses.thoughts:
**JSON Subtitle Generation Process - A Deep Dive**

Okay, so the task is clear: I need to generate synchronized subtitles in JSON format. The goal is precise timecoding, original language, and an English translation, all formatted to a maximum of 50 characters per line. I've got to manually transcribe and decode because that takes absolute precedence, using a given JSON format as a reference.

Right, let's break down the process. I'm starting with a scan from the beginning of the "Physical Autofister" video. I'm focusing on capturing the exact start and end times of each spoken phrase, down to the millisecond. Anything spoken simultaneously gets transcribed to one timestamp. I'm making sure to exclude any CC tags, like '[applause]', because the brief is specific.

As I go, I listen, transcribe each utterance with extreme accuracy, and then confirm those timestamps. I pay careful attention to the different voices and their timing - noting where characters begin and end. I also translate each phrase into English, keeping in mind the character limit. I'm particularly careful about capturing intonation and ensuring that it's all natural.

The hosts’ opening line, the contestants' introductions, the initial excitement - I need to capture it all. I've noted a fair bit of Japanese throughout, so I'm paying special attention to the pronunciation, so I translate everything from the Japanese text. I'm parsing this very carefully, making sure that what's spoken is what is represented.

When the hosts are explaining the rules of the course, I'm following every single rule very carefully, making sure that I'm accurately transcribing everything.

As the contestants begin to speak, I follow their utterances with great care, focusing on clarity. I'm listening out for the little inflections that show tone. I'm paying great attention to Japanese phrasing, making sure my Japanese translations make sense. When Bae speaks English, I am checking the English translation with additional care. I also note that some phrases are broken up, and I capture the precise moments.

I also have to listen for when the hosts start explaining the steps, and what the contestants have to do. The back and forth with this is important. Then, I keep going - the running, the questions, the answers, the little details. There are also times that there's crosstalk, and I've got to be fast to capture everything. Each round, I pay attention to every detail of the contest and their conversation.

As the rounds continue, there are things to look out for in the timing, which has to be exact, so that's key. It is crucial to have the correct translation, and this is where I'll do a sanity check to make sure that everything's correct. I'm always watching for the timing and that I am staying within the character limit. Now, let's keep going.
